column2: The Turks are poised to annex Hatay, part of our Mandate of Syria. Shall we let them, or will we make a stand after all?
France has acceded to our demands and Hatay is Turkish once more!
At the last instant, France has thwarted our plans in Hatay!
After the German occupation of Denmark in April 1940, British forces swiftly took possession of Iceland and the Faroe Islands to counter a possible threat of a German invasion.
Hu Hanmin, governor of Guandong dies

Hu Hanmin was one of the early leaders of the Kuomintang. Shortly after the 1911 revolution, he was appointed governor of Guangdong. After Sun Yat-sen's death in 1925, he was one of the three most powerful figures in the KMT, becoming a powerful leader in South China, and opposed Chiang Kai-Shek along with Wang Jingwei. He died of a cerebral hemorrhage on May 12, 1936, leading to a leadership crisis in the KMT
Suggest ending the autonomy of Guangdong!
With the death of Hu Hanmin, Chiang Kai-Shek wants to end the autonomy of Guangdong. Chen Jitang, the new governor, turns to Guangxi for help.
He was a real man of the people!
